auth_identities_issuer_subject_chk.name: auth_identities_issuer_subject_chk
auth_identities_issuer_subject_chk.value: char_length("auth_identities"."issuer") > 0 and "auth_identities"."issuer" = btrim("auth_identities"."issuer") and char_length("auth_identities"."subject") > 0 and "auth_identities"."subject" = btrim("auth_identities"."subject")

auth_identities_active_chk.name: auth_identities_active_chk
auth_identities_active_chk.value: "auth_identities"."status" <> 'active' or ("auth_identities"."verified_at" is not null and "auth_identities"."revoked_at" is null and "auth_identities"."lifecycle_status" = 'active')

auth_identities_revoked_chk.name: auth_identities_revoked_chk
auth_identities_revoked_chk.value: "auth_identities"."status" <> 'revoked' or ("auth_identities"."revoked_at" is not null and "auth_identities"."revocation_reason" is not null and char_length(btrim("auth_identities"."revocation_reason")) > 0 and "auth_identities"."is_primary" = false)

auth_identities_non_revoked_chk.name: auth_identities_non_revoked_chk
auth_identities_non_revoked_chk.value: "auth_identities"."status" = 'revoked' or ("auth_identities"."revoked_at" is null and "auth_identities"."revocation_reason" is null)

auth_identities_auth_time_chk.name: auth_identities_auth_time_chk
auth_identities_auth_time_chk.value: "auth_identities"."first_authenticated_at" is null or "auth_identities"."last_authenticated_at" is null or "auth_identities"."first_authenticated_at" <= "auth_identities"."last_authenticated_at"

invitations_accepted_chk.name: invitations_accepted_chk
invitations_accepted_chk.value: "invitations"."status" <> 'accepted' or ("invitations"."accepted_at" is not null and "invitations"."accepted_by_user_id" is not null)

invitations_revoked_chk.name: invitations_revoked_chk
invitations_revoked_chk.value: "invitations"."status" <> 'revoked' or ("invitations"."revoked_at" is not null and "invitations"."revocation_reason" is not null and char_length(btrim("invitations"."revocation_reason")) > 0)

user_session_contexts_membership_version.name: user_session_contexts_membership_version_chk
user_session_contexts_membership_version.value: ("user_session_contexts"."active_membership_id" is null and "user_session_contexts"."membership_version" is null) or ("user_session_contexts"."active_membership_id" is not null and "user_session_contexts"."membership_version" is not null and "user_session_contexts"."membership_version" > 0)
